column1: # Sparse deterministic checker-registry (D2 of the catalog-driven enforcement baseline).
# Maps a finding-slug to the SCRIPT that mechanizes it (beyond what the catalog rg-battery can do), its fixtures,
# and its maturity. The parity gate (scripts/check-checker-registry.ps1) FAILS LOUD if a hard-fail slug has no
# existing checker/fixtures, or if the checker emits a slug not registered here (drift). This is a queryable STORE,
# never loaded into LLM context (size-free). Baseline detection modality derives from the catalog scope_mode; this
# file only adds checker_id + checker_script + fixtures + maturity for the mechanizable-beyond-rg slugs.
